positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for football_positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    braga != nautico).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    ailton_silva != braga).

cnf(u25,negated_conjecture,
    ~plays_for(ailton_silva,fluminense)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ailton_silva != nautico).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    plays_for(ailton_silva,nautico)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    braga != fluminense).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    nautico != fluminense).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ailton_silva != fluminense).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define person(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define football_club(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define nickname(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define loaned_to(X0,X1) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
